ceremony.title: Ceremony
ceremony.description: The most special moment: we say 'I do', surrounded by the people we love most.

cocktail.title: Cocktail
cocktail.description: We toast together outdoors with drinks, delicious bites and even better conversations.

dinner.title: Dinner
dinner.description: A lovingly crafted dinner: the finest menu for a night we will never forget.

party.title: Party all night long!
party.description: Time to dance, laugh and enjoy ourselves to the fullest. Let's go!

whenWhere.subtitle: We'll be waiting for you here
whenWhere.title: When & Where

cards.title: Recommended areas
cards.body:
Historic centre of Zaragoza
Plaza de Roma area · University area
cards.sub: Hotels, apartments and guesthouses for every budget

cards.label: How to get here
cards.title: Getting to Zaragoza
cards.body:
High-speed train from Madrid (~1h 20min)
High-speed train from Barcelona (~1h 30min)
Zaragoza Airport (ZAZ)
cards.sub: Zaragoza is easily reachable by train, plane or car

tips: Visit the Basilica of Our Lady of the Pillar
Try ternasco lamb and migas con chorizo
Stroll through José Antonio Labordeta Park
Shopping on Calle Alfonso I and El Coso
The historic quarter is well worth a visit

gift.title: Would you like to give us a gift?
gift.p1: Your presence is already the greatest gift we could imagine. Truly. Really.
gift.p2: But if you insist... who are we to deny you that joy 😏
gift.footnote: And if the wine runs out before midnight, we also accept donations in kind. 🍷

cta.title: Didn't receive your invitation?
cta.p1: All personalised invitations with the confirmation link have already been sent.
cta.p2: If for any reason your email didn't arrive, get in touch and we'll resend it right away.

footer.quote: "With you I learned that love can also be peaceful."
footer.made: Made with 🤍 by TrinitySoft for Valeria and Eduardo
